---
title: "Getting Started with First Break AI"
date: today
categories: [cohort, ai, learning]
---

This is my first post as part of the [First Break AI](https://cohort.bubblnet.com) cohort.

## What I'm learning

I'm following the [roadmap](https://cohort.bubblnet.com/roadmap) to learn AI from the ground up — starting with setting up my dev environment and building this blog.

## Next steps

Check the [checklist](https://cohort.bubblnet.com/checklist) to see what accounts and tools you need.
